Know the Risk

WHAT HAPPENS WHEN
THE MARKET DROPS?

Most people don't realize how hard recovery is after a loss. These are the questions I ask every client — because awareness is the first step to protection.

▸ What would happen if the market dropped 20–30% again?
▸ Would that affect your retirement plans?
▸ Do you currently have any protection in place?
▸ How exposed is your money to risk right now?
▸ Would a market crash delay your retirement?
▸ Would it affect your lifestyle or your family?
The LAW Difference: With an IUL policy, your money grows with the market — but is shielded from losses. You never go backwards. Zero loss. Real growth.
$100,000 drops 20%
Becomes $80,000
↓ 20%
Back to $100,000
Must Grow
25% gain required
$100,000 drops 37%
Becomes $63,000
↓ 37%
Back to $100,000
Needs 58.7%
58.7% growth needed
$100,000 drops 50%
Becomes $50,000
↓ 50%
Back to $100,000
Needs 100%
100% gain required!
With a LAW IUL policy — if the index drops, your cash value holds its ground. You start fresh the next year from your high-water mark. That's the power of the floor.

The Strategy

BUILD WEALTH
WITHOUT THE RISK

An Indexed Universal Life policy is not just insurance — it's a tax-advantaged financial engine designed to grow your legacy.

🎯 What an IUL Does For You
📈 Grows linked to market indexes (like S&P 500) — without direct investment risk
🔒 0% floor protection — market drops don't touch your cash value
💰 Tax-free retirement income through policy loans
🏥 Living benefits for critical, chronic & terminal illness
👨‍👩‍👧 Death benefit that builds a lasting legacy for your family
📊 IUL vs. Traditional Savings
401k / Market
Market losses hit you
Taxed on withdrawal
No death benefit
No living benefits
Employer dependent
LAW IUL Policy
0% floor — no losses
Tax-free retirement
Death benefit
Critical illness riders
You own it — always
🌟 This Is For You If...
▸ You want to protect your family AND grow wealth
▸ You're tired of watching the market take your money
▸ You want tax-free income in retirement
▸ You're ready to build a real legacy

About Alexander Johnson

DRIVEN BY PURPOSE.
BUILT ON INTEGRITY.

Hi, I'm Alexander Johnson — founder of LAW (Legacy Actively Winning). My name says it all: every family I work with is actively building a legacy that wins — financially, generationally, and purposefully.

I'm not here to sell you something. I'm here to educate you, show you what's possible, and help you build a strategy that protects your family and builds real wealth — with zero market risk.

I work with men and women nationwide — from first-time policy holders to business owners — because financial protection is for everyone. I'm licensed in all 50 states and always accessible personally.

Integrity Above All
Education First
